rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing paper’s core problem: both focus on online clickstream/search behavior and consideration-set formation, and the cited work provides an empirical model of Stage 1 viewing versus Stage 2 purchase decisions. The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending consideration-set research with online search traces, making the 2006 two-stage clickstream model a plausible methodological/foundational source rather than a generic mention. With only DOI-level match evidence and no indication of incidental listing, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
